title: ReferencedDashboard - Metadata API
description: Represents the ReferencedDashboard object in CRM Analytics. A referenced dashboard stores information about an externally referenced dashboard.

application.description: The internal name of the Analytics app.

description.description: The dashboard description that appears in the user interface.

embedUrl.description: The URL to the referenced dashboard.

masterLabel.description: The dashboard name that appears in the user interface.

templateAssetSourceName.description: Links the dashboard to the template used to create it. Null for assets not created from a template.

visibility.description: The visibility of the dashboard. Valid values are: ALL and LIMITED.

wsdl_segment:
```xml
<xsd:complexType name="Metadata">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="fullName" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="ReferencedDashboard">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="application" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="description" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="embedUrl" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="masterLabel" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="templateAssetSourceName" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="visibility" type="xsd:string"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
```
